titleStmt.title: SII 41.130: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 130. (A.R. No. 129 of 1905.) Kaḷakkāḍu. Nāṅgunēri Taluk, Tirunelvēli District. On the east wall of the central shrine in the Perumal temple at Kaḷakkāḍu.

summary.p: Incomplete. The cyclic year and the Śaka year do not tally. Records that Rāmappa-nāyakkar, the executive agent (kāriyattukku karttar) of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Timmarāja Viṭṭaladēva gave something (details lost) to the temple of Paramasvāmi at Chōḻakulavallipuram alias Kaḷakkāḍu in Pāchchāṟṟuppōkku in Vāṉava-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . maṉ mahāmaṇṭaliccura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāric cāḷuva Ariyarāya vipāṭa pāḻcai
kkut tappavarāya kaṇṭa muvaraya kaṇṭa tulukka taḷavipāṭa Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭu Iḻanti
ṟai koṇṭarācātirācaṉ Irācaparameccuraṉ cāḷuvarācaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭukoṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭā
tāṉ pūṟuva teccaṣaṇa paccuma Uttara camuttirātipati kecaveṭṭaikaṇṭaruḷiya ciṟi virappiratā
pacatācivatevamakārāyar pitupivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Aṉ
patteḻiṉ mel cellā niṉṟa parāpava varuṣam Aṟpaci mācam Iraṇṭān teti cirimaṉ makāma
ṇṭalaccura Irāmarācatimmarāca viṭṭala tevamakārācāviṉ kāriyattukku karttarāṉa
Irāmappa nāyakkar vāṉavaṉāṭṭup pācāṟṟup pokku kaḷakkāṭāṉa coḻakula
vallipurattu makā pūcaik koṇṭiruntaruḷiya perumāṉ paracūrāmapperu
māḷ kku taṉmacātaṉappaṭṭaiyam kuṭuttapaṭi kaḷakkāṭuk kāppa
Digital edition of SII 41.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
